title: Cobblemon Spawn Notifications in Spanish
description: Don't miss your Pokémon spawns with these messages in Spanish!
body:
Don't miss your spawns with these messages!

This resource pack adds customized Spanish messages to the Cobblemon Mod Cobblemon Spawn Notification.
  • Cobblemon Spawn Notification 1.6 ( Download )
  • Dependencies according to Cobblemon Spawn Notification mod requirements!


According to mod settings, you will see these messages in the game chat!
These messages include Coords, Biome and Dimension.

"broadcastLegendary":

"broadcastShiny":

"broadcastDespawns":



  1. Download the CM-Spawn-Noti-1.4+es_es.zip.
  2. Put it inside the folder resourcepacks of your Minecraft installation. An easy way to access this folder is via the ingame Options → Resource Packs, and click the bottom left button (Open Pack Folder).
  3. Select the CM-Spawn-Noti-1.4+es_es.zip resourse pack from the available packs ingame (Options → Resource Packs).
  4. Click Done.
  5. On Minecraft Options, language must be set to Español (España).

  • I don't see any messages at all
    You need to download and install the mod Cobblemon Spawn Notification for you to see any messages at all. Make sure your server Admin install it server-side too.

  • My messages are in English
    You have to set your Minecraft Language to Español (España) for the resourcepack to take effect.

  • I have set the correct Language but I still don't see any messages in Spanish
    Remember to Select (move to the right column) the correct resourcepack from your Available list on your game Options → Resource Packs.
Since some of the messages found in this resourcepack are not neutral Spanish (memeish, if you will), I didn't suggest these translation to the mod.

Check out my other projects!
